# JKM Edit - Comprehensive Online Digital Tools Platform

> JKM Edit is an all-in-one suite of free, browser-based utility tools designed to enhance productivity, simplify file management, and assist developers, students, and businesses. No software installation is required.

## Core Navigation
- **Home Page:** The main dashboard for all JKM Edit utilities. [https://jkmedit.in/](https://jkmedit.in/)
- **Blog:** Expert guides, tutorials, and productivity tips. [https://jkmedit.in/blog/index.html](https://jkmedit.in/blog/index.html)

---

## 📄 PDF Tools
A complete suite for managing, editing, and converting PDF documents securely in the browser. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/index.html)

- **Merge PDF:** Combine multiple PDF files into a single, organized document. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/merge-pdf.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/merge-pdf.html)
- **Split PDF:** Extract specific pages or split large PDFs into smaller files. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/split-pdf.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/split-pdf.html)
- **Compress PDF:** Reduce PDF file size for easy email sharing without losing quality. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/compress-pdf.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/compress-pdf.html)
- **Add Watermark:** Protect documents by adding custom text or image watermarks. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Watermark.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Watermark.html)
- **View PDF:** A fast, lightweight browser-based PDF reader. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/View-PDF.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/View-PDF.html)
- **PDF to JPG:** Convert PDF pages into high-quality JPG image files. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/pdf-to-image.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/pdf-to-image.html)
- **JPG to PDF:** Combine image files (JPG/PNG) into a single PDF document. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PNG-to-pdf.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PNG-to-pdf.html)
- **Dark Mode PDF:** Read PDFs comfortably at night with an inverted color/dark mode viewer. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Dark-Mode.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Dark-Mode.html)
- **PDF Auto Scroll:** Hands-free PDF reading with adjustable scrolling speeds. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-auto.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-auto.html)
- **PDF Notepad:** Take notes and annotate directly alongside your PDF documents. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-Notepad.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-Notepad.html)
- **Add Page Number:** Automatically insert page numbers into existing PDF files. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/add-page-number.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/add-page-number.html)
- **Rotate PDF:** Fix orientation issues by rotating PDF pages permanently. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/rotate-pdf.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/rotate-pdf.html)

---

## 🖼️ Image Tools
Browser-based photo editing, conversion, and optimization utilities. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/index.html)

- **Image Cropper:** Crop images to specific aspect ratios or custom dimensions. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Img-crop.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Img-crop.html)
- **Image Resizer:** Change image width and height for social media or web optimization. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/image-resizer.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/image-resizer.html)
- **JPG/PNG Converter:** Swap formats between JPG and PNG seamlessly. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Jpg-Png.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Jpg-Png.html)
- **Background Remover:** Instantly isolate subjects and remove image backgrounds. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/BG-remove.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/BG-remove.html)
- **Grayscale Filter:** Convert vibrant color photos into classic black and white. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/grayscale-filter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/grayscale-filter.html)
- **Rotate & Flip:** Mirror, flip, or rotate images to the desired angle. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/rotate-flip.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/rotate-flip.html)
- **Brightness Adjuster:** Enhance photos by tweaking brightness and contrast levels. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/brightness-contrast.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/brightness-contrast.html)
- **Add Text Overlay:** Quickly add typography, memes, or captions to images. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/add-text.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/add-text.html)
- **Exif Data Viewer:** Extract and read hidden metadata (camera settings, location) from photos. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/exif-viewer.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/exif-viewer.html)

---

## 💰 Finance & Accounting
Tools to manage money, generate business documents, and calculate loans. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/index.html)

- **Invoice Maker:** Generate professional billing invoices for clients instantly. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/invoicemaker.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/invoicemaker.html)
- **EMI Calculator:** Plan loans and mortgages with accurate monthly installment breakdowns. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/EMI-Calculator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/EMI-Calculator.html)
- **Bank Analysis:** Reconcile and analyze bank statements. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/bank-reco.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/bank-reco.html)
- **Build CV:** Create professional resumes and CVs for job applications. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/build-cv.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/build-cv.html)
- **Ledger (Udhar Khata):** Digital accounting book to track credits, debits, and daily expenses. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/ledger.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/ledger.html)

---

## 📂 File & Text Tools
Utilities for formatting code, manipulating strings, and handling data files. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/index.html)

- **CSV to JSON:** Convert spreadsheet CSV data into structured JSON objects. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/csv-to-json.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/csv-to-json.html)
- **JSON Formatter:** Beautify, validate, and structure messy JSON code. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/json-formatter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/json-formatter.html)
- **Base64 Encoder/Decoder:** Encode files to Base64 strings or decode them back. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/base64-tool.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/base64-tool.html)
- **Text Case Converter:** Change text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, etc. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/Text-Case-Converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/Text-Case-Converter.html)
- **Remove Duplicate Lines:** Instantly clean up lists by removing repeated entries. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/remove-duplicates.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/remove-duplicates.html)
- **Find/Replace Text:** Bulk search and replace specific words within large text blocks. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/find-replace.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/find-replace.html)
- **Hash Calculator:** Generate MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256 cryptographic hashes from text. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/hash-calculator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/hash-calculator.html)
- **File Viewer:** Universal browser-based reader for various file types. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-viewer.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-viewer.html)
- **Line Sorter:** Sort text lines alphabetically or numerically. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/line-sorter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/line-sorter.html)
- **File Splitter:** Break large text/data files into smaller, manageable chunks. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-splitter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-splitter.html)

---

## ⚙️ Code Generators
Developer-friendly tools for web design, security, and quick asset creation. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/index.html)

- **QR Code Generator:** Create custom, scannable QR codes for links, text, or contacts. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/Qr-Code.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/Qr-Code.html)
- **Barcode Generator:** Generate retail and inventory barcodes instantly. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/barcode-generator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/barcode-generator.html)
- **Password Generator:** Create highly secure, randomized passwords. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/password-generator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/password-generator.html)
- **UUID/GUID Generator:** Generate unique identifiers for database and software development. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/uuid-generator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/uuid-generator.html)
- **Color Palette Generator:** Extract or generate beautiful UI color schemes. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/color-palette.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/color-palette.html)
- **Lorem Ipsum Generator:** Generate placeholder dummy text for web mockups. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/lorem-ipsum.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/lorem-ipsum.html)
- **Favicon Generator:** Create website icons (favicons) from images or text. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/favicon-generator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/favicon-generator.html)
- **CSS Box Shadow Generator:** Visually design and export CSS code for box shadows. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/box-shadow.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/box-shadow.html)
- **CSS Gradient Generator:** Create linear and radial CSS backgrounds easily. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/gradient-generator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/gradient-generator.html)
- **HTML Entities Converter:** Escape or unescape HTML tags and special characters. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/html-entities.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/html-entities.html)
- **QR Scan to Excel:** Scan QR codes directly into spreadsheet formats. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/qr-excel.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/qr-excel.html)

---

## ⏳ Time & Date Tools
Calculators and utilities for managing dates, time zones, and chronometrics. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/index.html)

- **Timestamp Converter:** Convert Unix epochs to human-readable dates and vice versa. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/timestamp-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/timestamp-converter.html)
- **Date Difference:** Calculate the exact days, months, and years between two dates. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/date-difference.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/date-difference.html)
- **Countdown Timer:** Set custom web-based countdowns for events. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/countdown.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/countdown.html)
- **Stopwatch:** A precise digital stopwatch for tracking laps and duration. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/Stopwatch.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/Stopwatch.html)
- **Timezone Converter:** Sync meetings by comparing different global time zones. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/timezone.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/timezone.html)
- **Leap Year Checker:** Instantly check if a specific year is a leap year. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/leap-year.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/leap-year.html)
- **Day of Week Calculator:** Find out what day of the week a historical or future date falls on. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/day-of-week.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/day-of-week.html)
- **Age Calculator:** Determine precise age in years, months, and days from a birthdate. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/age-calculator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/age-calculator.html)
- **Time Adder/Subtracter:** Add or subtract specific hours and minutes from a given time. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/time-adder.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/time-adder.html)
- **Calendar Generator:** Generate printable or viewable custom monthly/yearly calendars. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/calendar.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/calendar.html)

---

## 📏 Unit Converters & Calculators
Fast mathematical converters for science, engineering, and daily use. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/index.html)

- **Length Converter:** Convert between meters, feet, inches, kilometers, and miles. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/length-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/length-converter.html)
- **Mass/Weight Converter:** Convert between kilograms, pounds, ounces, and grams. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/weight-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/weight-converter.html)
- **Temperature Converter:** Swap between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin scales. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/temp-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/temp-converter.html)
- **Area Converter:** Convert square meters, acres, hectares, and square feet. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/area-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/area-converter.html)
- **Volume Converter:** Calculate and convert liters, gallons, milliliters, etc. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/volume-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/volume-converter.html)
- **Speed Converter:** Convert km/h, mph, and meters per second. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/speed-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/speed-converter.html)
- **Base Converter:** Translate numbers between Binary, Octal, Decimal, and Hexadecimal. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/base-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/base-converter.html)
- **HEX-RGB-HSL Converter:** Convert web color codes between standard developer formats. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/color-code-converter.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/color-code-converter.html)
- **Scientific Calculator:** Perform complex trigonometric, logarithmic, and mathematical equations. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/sci-calculator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/sci-calculator.html)
- **Simple Interest Calculator:** Calculate financial interest over time on principal amounts. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/interest-calculator.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/interest-calculator.html)

---

## 🌐 Web & UI Tools
Resources for webmasters, SEOs, and front-end developers. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/index.html)

- **Web Code Preview:** Test HTML, CSS, and JS snippets live in the browser. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/web-preview.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/web-preview.html)
- **Web Code Editor:** A lightweight browser-based IDE for writing and editing code. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/Webeditor.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/Webeditor.html)
- **Sitemap Generator/Viewer:** Manage and generate XML sitemaps for SEO optimization. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/sitemap.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/web/sitemap.html)

---

## 🛠️ Miscellaneous Utilities
A collection of handy tools for audio, video, and daily digital tasks. [View Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/index.html)

- **Chat Utility:** Secure browser-based communication tool. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Chat.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Chat.html)
- **Color Picker:** Extract precise color codes from images or screens. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Color-Picker.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Color-Picker.html)
- **Hindi to Hinglish Converter:** Transliterate Hindi text into the Latin (Hinglish) alphabet. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/hinglish.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/hinglish.html)
- **Lyrics Maker:** Write, format, and organize song lyrics efficiently. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/lyricmaker.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/lyricmaker.html)
- **Screen Recorder:** Record your browser screen or desktop natively without installing software. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/screen-recorder.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/screen-recorder.html)
- **WhatsApp Chat Backup:** Tools to manage and read WhatsApp chat exports. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Whatsapp-chat.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Whatsapp-chat.html)
- **YouTube to MP3:** Audio extraction utility for media files. [https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Yt-mp3.html](https://jkmedit.in/tools/utilities/Yt-mp3.html)
